title: Time Entry Schema
description: Schema for structured time-tracking data extracted from notes with time codes

date.description: Date of the time entries (YYYY-MM-DD) - from the first entry

created.description: Date and time when the note was created

last_updated.description: Date and time when the note was last updated

time_entries.description: List of time entries sorted chronologically

timestamp.description: Full timestamp of the entry (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS or HH:MM:SS)

end_time.description: End time for continuation entries (HH:MM format, 24-hour)

duration.description: Duration in minutes for continuation entries

main_activity.description: Main activity component extracted from activity string

sub_activity.description: Sub-activity component extracted from activity string (empty if not present)

project_type.description: Classification of the activity as work or personal

project.description: Specific project name (e.g., 'stop' for end of day activities)

raw_line.description: Original text line from the note

raw_text.description: Original raw text of the note
